Safe auto-fix surface per workflow = mostly i18n + small data-contract/label fixes. Topic + organization were the cleanest. ALWAYS verify CRITICAL DB/RPC findings vs live SQL before acting (WG #1 was a false positive: stale migration file vs already-patched deployed RPC).
